name: Regulated Enterprise (EU)
description: Large enterprises in financial services, healthcare, and critical infrastructure with 1,000+ employees across the EU requiring sovereign cloud and GDPR-compliant IT modernization.

tam.description: EU-wide managed cloud services in regulated industries
tam.source: LLM estimate based on Gartner, IDC 2025 European cloud infrastructure and platform services market

sam.description: EU regulated enterprise sovereign cloud and managed infrastructure (ex-DACH)
sam.source: LLM estimate: EU27 regulated cloud spending excluding DACH; sovereign cloud premium commands ~EUR 8.5B in addressable spend

som.description: 30 enterprise accounts x EUR 4M average ACV over 3 years
som.source: Bottom-up estimate: T-Systems expanding EU presence via Gaia-X and sovereign cloud partnerships; targeting 30 new accounts in Benelux, Nordics, Southern Europe
